description_long: This object is a tall, cylindrical can with a dark, nearly black exterior featuring subtle, abstract patterns in deep blue and purple hues. The front of the can displays bold, vertically oriented text reading 'LUXEN' in a modern, metallic font. The top is a standard pull-tab opening, typical of beverage cans, with a metallic silver finish. On the reverse side, there is a visible QR code printed in a light gray color, standing out against the dark background. The can's surface is smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light in certain areas. No additional graphics, flavor indications, or nutritional information are visible on the exterior.
description: A tall, dark beverage can with 'LUXEN' text on the front and a QR code on the back, featuring a sleek, glossy finish and abstract patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'LUXEN' text in metallic font against a dark, patterned background.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting a QR code printed in gray on the dark can surface.
description_view_2: Another front view similar to view 0, with 'LUXEN' text clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear/side view with the QR code visible, similar to view 1 but with slightly different lighting on the abstract patterns.
attribute_brand_logo: The can features the word 'LUXEN' in a large, metallic font vertically on the front; this serves as the brand logo. It is silver/gray in color and centrally placed.
